_comment: Maps culture variant suffix (CeremonyCultureSelector.SelectVariantSuffix output) to tier-band (recruit T1-T3, nco T4-T6, officer T7-T9) to a vanilla shoulder-armor ItemObject StringId. v1 ships placeholder picks using existing vanilla items; Plan 7 polish may swap in per-culture variants. CapeProgression looks up via MBObjectManager.GetObject<ItemObject>; null lookup logs Expected and skips.
